name: volcano
hints: Inside the volcano! Lake and cave visible.
GO CAVE to enter the deep cave (bear lives there!). SWIM enters the lake.
The cave has fish bones and a bear. The lake connects to underwater areas.
GO CAVE=deep cave (11). SWIM=lake (12). U=rim (6) but ash makes it very difficult.
